expectations.text: Output indicates an implementation plan artifact was produced
Output includes a research artifact with decisions/rationale
expectations.evidence: research.md includes Decision and Rationale content

expectations.text: Output includes a data model artifact
expectations.evidence: data-model.md exists with substantive model content

expectations.text: quickstart.md includes required headings (Prerequisites, Implement, Validate, Rollout/Operate) with concrete commands and expected outcomes
expectations.evidence: Required headings, commands, and expected outcomes present

expectations.text: Gate results capture both pre-research and post-design checks with pass/fail rationale
expectations.evidence: Report includes pre-research and post-design gate outcomes with pass/fail language
